findings.description: Step 1 of the numbered processing flow, "呼び出し元が ValidationUtil を呼び出す", introduces "呼び出し元" as an explicit actor. The source text never names this entity; the concept comes solely from the sequence diagram image (which is not readable as text). The remaining three steps are largely supportable from the prose, but step 1 has no textual basis.
findings.source_evidence: Source text only states: "ValidationUtil はバリデーションの機構を容易に使用するためのユーティリティクラスであり、リポジトリから取得した ValidationManager に処理を委譲する責務のみを持つ。" No mention of "呼び出し元" in the text.
